messages.message:
World Cup 2026 Match Simulator Parameters:
Tournament Phase Context: KNOCKOUT
Phase Resolution Rules: A knockout match must always produce exactly ONE of the following valid outcomes:

1. Team A wins in regular time:
   - predicted_score is NOT tied
   - predicted_winner = Team A
   - ended_in_extra_time = false
   - ended_in_penalties = false

2. Team B wins in regular time:
   - predicted_score is NOT tied
   - predicted_winner = Team B
   - ended_in_extra_time = false
   - ended_in_penalties = false

3. Team A or Team B wins in extra time:
   - predicted_score is NOT tied
   - predicted_winner is the winning team
   - ended_in_extra_time = true
   - ended_in_penalties = false

4. Team A or Team B wins on penalties:
   - predicted_score MUST be tied because it is the score after extra time (120 minutes)
   - predicted_winner is the penalty winner
   - ended_in_extra_time = false
   - ended_in_penalties = true
   - penalty_shootout_score MUST be provided

Any other combination of values is INVALID. Never return an invalid combination.
Designated Match Host Country: United States
